_meta.keyKnowledge: We generate, develop, resolve and refine design ideas, concepts and solutions for specific audiences using the visual communication design process.

_source.w: We generate, develop, resolve and refine design ideas, concepts and solutions for specific audiences using the visual communication design process.
y: Mastering the design process prepares us for professional practice in the creative industries.
Designing for specific audiences requires sophisticated understanding of communication, culture and context.
The iterative design process develops problem-solving skills applicable across many disciplines.
eg: We apply the full design process — research, ideation, development, resolution, refinement — to complex briefs.
We generate diverse design concepts and evaluate them against criteria and audience needs.
We develop solutions across different fields of design — graphic, product, environmental, digital.
We refine our designs through prototyping, testing and evaluation.
We present comprehensive design proposals showing the evolution of our ideas.
We demonstrate understanding of how design decisions affect communication effectiveness.
